subject: Re: Fwd: Letter
body:
ask him about the church   ,, how often,, what does it mean?

Dear Sir,
Thank you for the opportunity to speak with you on these matters. I am hopeful that this will not effect Mr. Epstein's decision to bring me on board with your company. The enclosed attachment contains a letter that I had hoped would bring light to the issue on hand. Once again, thank you for your time and consideration.
                                                                                                               With sincerity,
                                                                                                               Clinton R. Wunderly
